daily.today_energy: Mercury's got your back today, Cap. There's a quiet momentum building beneath the surface—think of it as your intuition doing the heavy lifting while you're just existing. Trust the slow burn.
daily.love: Someone's been noticing you more than you realize. Whether you're coupled up or solo, today brings a chance to be seen for who you actually are, not who you think you should be. Let that guard down a little.
daily.career: Your ideas hit different right now. That thing you've been sitting on? Today's the day the energy supports you speaking up. People are more receptive than usual—ride that wave.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Less pushing, more listening. A walk, some water, maybe some stretching—nothing extreme. Recovery energy is stronger than hustle energy rn.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to soften your edges, Cap. You've been grinding hard, but the cosmos is whispering that rest is productivity too. Trust the slower pace—magic happens in the pauses between your power moves.
weekly.love: Venus is playing in your court this week, bringing unexpected warmth to connections. If you've been holding back vulnerability, now's the time to let someone see the real you. Single? Someone's about to appreciate your dry humor more than you'd expect.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. Don't sleep on that creative spark bubbling up—it might be exactly what your space needs. Focus on collaboration over solo grinding. Your network is lowkey your greatest asset this moment.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. The usual hustle mode isn't serving you right now. Try switching things up: slower workouts, better sleep, actually sitting down to eat. Your nervous system will thank you for the reset.
